title: Greatly Sweet Argentinian Almond Empanadas
description: A sweet and snappy Argentinian dish featuring almond paste, perfect for kids and flexitarian-friendly, made with score-fat for a delicious flavor.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, score fat, and salt, and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of almond paste in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with beaten eggs and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the empanadas from the oven and let them cool on a wire rack.
